title: Canopy Growth Provides Update on International Operations and Activities
text: Canopy Growth provided updates on international operations and expansion activities focusing on Europe and Australia markets. Company operates principal operations in Canada, Europe and Australia with strategic expansion initiatives underway. Miles Worne appointed Managing Director for European Markets signaling Canopy's desire to expand footprint in Europe. Q3 2025 results showed International Markets revenue of $12 million up 14% year-over-year with European business growing over 70% driven by Poland and Germany strength. Poland achieved outsized growth from secured import permits enabling rapid market penetration. Australian market faced increased competition but remained important growth market. Company pursuing multi-country European strategy with focus on medical cannabis and regulatory opportunities. International expansion supports long-term growth strategy beyond Canada market saturation. Strategic partnerships and local management hiring critical to international success across multiple markets.
